findings.title: Admin route needs explicit auth boundary
findings.description: A route with service-role access needs tenant-scoped or platform-admin authorization evidence.
findings.suggested_fix: Add the existing restaurant admin access helper or platform admin guard.
findings.evidence_required: Show route-level access check and successful build.

findings.title: Environment inventory needs pilot placeholders
findings.description: Required local/pilot environment variables should be documented with sanitized placeholders.
findings.suggested_fix: Add sanitized placeholder values and comments for required env vars.

events.message: Recheck completed after auth boundary fix.
